working_on: Routine task AUDIT-HT-2 (T-PHASE-5-AUDIT) — second half of decomposed-AUDIT-HT (decomposed at S-0117 administrative close per Issue #58 because the original 96-edge + 10-node + 3-trace single-task scope hit context cap mid-authoring at S-0117). Sequential after AUDIT-HT-1 (depends_on AUDIT-HT-1 satisfied at S-0119) so two routine fires don't race to author both halves.
